household.title: Household
household.description: Invite trusted people to share access to all the accounts you own. Members see your accounts and (with write access) can record transactions on them.

myHousehold.title: My household
myHousehold.description: People here get access to every account you own. Per-account shares always override household access.

household.noMembers: No one has joined your household yet.
household.loadMembersError: Couldn't load household members. Try refreshing.

writeScope.own: Can edit only their own transactions

invite.emailDeliveryFailed: Invitation created, but the email couldn't be delivered. You can resend it from the invitations panel.

revoke.title: Remove household member?
revoke.description: {handle} will lose access to every account in your household. Per-account shares (if any) are unaffected.

imIn.title: Households I'm in
imIn.description: Other people's households you've joined. Leaving drops your access to every account they shared this way.
imIn.empty: You haven't joined anyone else's household.
imIn.loadError: Couldn't load the households you're in. Try again later.

leave.title: Leave this household?
leave.description: You'll lose access to every account {owner} shares through their household. Per-account shares (if any) are unaffected.

pending.cancelDescription: Cancel the pending invitation sent to {email}? They will no longer be able to accept it.
pending.resendDeliveryFailed: Invitation updated, but the email could not be sent. Try again later.
